description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical device with a teal-colored tank at the base and a black, metallic upper section featuring a handle and a visible motor. The front side displays a pressure gauge and a filter assembly, with a power cord extending outward, suggesting it is electrically powered. The upper section has a metallic, finned motor housing and a prominent handle for portability. The tank is supported by two sturdy feet, and warning labels are visible on the side. The overall construction appears robust, with a mix of metal and plastic components. The object is detailed with industrial features, including a pressure regulator and a power switch, making it suitable for utility or workshop environments.
description: A compact, teal and black cylindrical device with a handle, motor housing, and pressure gauge, featuring industrial details and a power cord. It has a robust, metallic construction with visible warning labels and utility components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle, pressure gauge, filter assembly, and power cord extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical tank, motor housing, and the filter assembly attached to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tank, handle, and the attachment points for the motor and feet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the motor housing, warning labels, and the power cord with plug.
attribute_engine_housing: compact, finned metallic housing above the tank
